_comment: Wang Lin bidirectional protocol. Per Article XXXI.2: initiation works both ways. Sometimes the player asks Wang Lin. Sometimes Wang Lin approaches the player — unbidden, no marker, no quest log — and offers a copied jade slip, a silent demonstration, or one word of warning. This file defines how Wang Lin decides to approach, when, and what he offers. It also defines the protagonist-copy 'Request Capability' mechanic: Wang Lin evaluates understanding, harm, motive, judgment, and timing before his True Body creates a copy and a clone hands it over.

_design_notes.wang_lin_is_not_a_quest_giver: Wang Lin never gives quests. He observes. He judges. Occasionally, he intervenes. This file defines the conditions under which he intervenes — and what 'intervention' looks like (which is usually quiet, brief, and consequential).
_design_notes.no_marker: Wang Lin's approaches never appear on a map, never trigger a quest log, never show a reward popup. The player either notices him or doesn't. If the player ignores him, he leaves. The opportunity may not return.
_design_notes.true_body_and_clone: When Wang Lin offers an item (a copied jade slip, a technique), it is not 'Wang Lin gives item.' His True Body (elsewhere, cultivating or in seclusion) creates a copy, and a clone (present near the player) hands it over. This is canonical to Renegade Immortal and gives the mechanic its weight.
_design_notes.judgment_over_transaction: Wang Lin does not trade. He judges. The player cannot buy a technique from him; the player must demonstrate they deserve it. This is what makes Wang Lin feel like Wang Lin.

evaluation.description: Every 2000 ticks, Wang Lin's manifestation (if present in the same region as the player) evaluates whether to approach. The evaluation considers the player's observed behavior, not quest flags.
conditions_for_approach: player has NOT stolen the Heaven Defying Bead (memory_tag: stole_the_jade blocks all mentorship)
player is not in active combat with a canonical ally of Wang Lin
player is in a calm moment (not mid-combat, not mid-tribulation)

approach_triggers.name: Player repeatedly studies restrictions
conditions: player.action: examine_restriction OR study_formation repeated >= 5 times across >= 3 days

approach.description: Wang Lin walks over. Says nothing at first. Hands the player a copied jade slip. Then leaves. The slip contains a restriction technique the player could not have obtained otherwise.

gift.via: clone (True Body created the copy elsewhere)

judgment.motive: curiosity (observed — player studied voluntarily, not for reward)

approach_triggers.consequence_on_ignore: if player walks away before handover: Wang Lin pockets the slip and leaves; the opportunity does not recur for 60 days; memory_ledger += wang_lin_withdrew

approach_triggers.name: Player struggles with a technique Wang Lin has mastered
conditions: player.action: attempt_technique failing >= 3 times in 1 day
technique is one Wang Lin has canonically mastered (restriction, ji_realm, heaven_defying)

approach.description: Wang Lin approaches and says one word: 'Watch.' He performs the technique once, flawlessly, then walks away. The player's Knowledge System records the observed demonstration. The player may now attempt the technique with improved odds — but Wang Lin has not taught it. He showed it. Understanding is the player's problem.

approach_triggers.consequence_on_ignore: if player looks away during demonstration: no knowledge gained; Wang Lin notices and does not offer again for 90 days

approach_triggers.name: Player is about to make a canonical mistake
conditions: player is approaching a canonical danger Wang Lin has survived (e.g. attempting to refine a forbidden pill, entering a restriction beyond their realm, trusting a canonical betrayer)
wang_lin has observed the player enough to care (favor >= 3)

approach.description: Wang Lin passes by. He says one word — 'Don't.' or 'Wait.' or the name of the danger. He does not explain. He keeps walking. The player can heed or ignore.

approach_triggers.consequence_on_fulfill: player.knowledge += wang_lin_warning: <danger>; if player heeds: favor += 1 (Wang Lin notices); memory_ledger += wang_lin_warned
approach_triggers.consequence_on_ignore: if player ignores and the danger manifests: Wang Lin does not intervene to save them; he warned; favor unchanged (he is not resentful, he is Wang Lin); memory_ledger += player_ignored_wang_lin

approach_triggers.name: Wang Lin invites the player to travel with him briefly
conditions: player has demonstrated restraint (no theft, no betrayal of canonical allies, no cruelty to mortals)
Wang Lin is traveling through a region the player is in

approach.description: Wang Lin nods at the player and says 'Come.' No explanation. He walks. The player can follow or not. If they follow, he leads them to something — a hidden restriction, an abandoned cave, a view of a spirit vein. He does not explain what it is. He leaves the player to understand.

approach_triggers.consequence_on_fulfill: player discovers a location/knowledge they could not have found alone; favor:wang_lin += 1; memory_ledger += wang_lin_travelled_with_player
approach_triggers.consequence_on_ignore: if player does not follow: Wang Lin does not invite again for 90 days; no resentment; memory_ledger += player_declined_wang_lin

approach_triggers.name: Player requests a capability Wang Lin judges they are not ready for
conditions: player invokes request_technique or request_artifact_copy affordance on Wang Lin
Wang Lin's judgment fails on one or more criteria

approach.description: Wang Lin does not hand over the capability. He may say nothing (silent refusal), or he may ask a question that reveals why he refused. He does not negotiate.
line_variants: (silent refusal — he turns back to what he was doing)
Come back when you understand why I refuse.

judgment.can_understand: evaluated against player.knowledge prerequisites for the specific capability
judgment.will_harm: evaluated against the capability's backlash risk vs player's realm
judgment.motive: evaluated against player's observed pattern — greed, ambition, defense, curiosity, duty
judgment.judgment_demonstrated: evaluated against player's past decisions (memory ledger: theft, mercy, restraint, courage)
judgment.right_time: evaluated against current world state — is the player about to face something that needs this, or is it idle acquisition?

approach_triggers.consequence_on_fulfill: player.knowledge += wang_lin_refused_and_why (partial, if a line variant explained); favor unchanged; memory_ledger += wang_lin_refused_capability
approach_triggers.consequence_on_ignore: if player presses or demands: favor -= 2; Wang Lin may leave the region; memory_ledger += player_pressured_wang_lin

approach_triggers.name: Player requests a capability Wang Lin judges they are ready for
conditions: player invokes request_technique or request_artifact_copy affordance on Wang Lin

approach.description: Wang Lin's True Body (wherever it is) creates a copy of the capability — a copied jade slip, a replicated artifact. A clone of Wang Lin (present with the player) hands it over. No ceremony. The player has earned it through demonstrated judgment, not transaction.

judgment.judgment_demonstrated: PASS (memory ledger shows restraint, mercy, courage as appropriate)

approach_triggers.consequence_on_fulfill: player obtains the capability; favor:wang_lin += 1; memory_ledger += wang_lin_granted_capability
approach_triggers.consequence_on_ignore: n/a (this trigger fires only on player request)

_player_to_wang_lin.note: The player may also approach Wang Lin. The affordances Wang Lin exposes (Article XXVIII) include: ask, observe, debate, learn, challenge, spar, request_artifact_copy, request_technique, request_advice, travel_together. These are the player-initiated verbs. Wang Lin's response to each is governed by the judgment block above — he does not transact, he judges.
_player_to_wang_lin.request_advice: Wang Lin may give a one-line answer, a silent look, or nothing. His advice is rarely direct — he prefers the player to reason.
_player_to_wang_lin.spar: Wang Lin will spar only if the player is within two realms of him. He pulls his strikes. The player will lose. The point is observation, not victory.
_player_to_wang_lin.debate: Wang Lin enjoys debate with a worthy interlocutor. A debate that changes his mind (rare) increases favor significantly. A debate that wastes his time decreases it.
